Item Name: Easter Candy Coated Mini Milk Chocolate Eggs 36 Ounces
Bullet Point 1: Delightful milk chocolate eggs with delicious, crisp sugar shells perfect for Easter candy dishes, Easter baskets, party favors, lunch boxes and movie night snacking
Bullet Point 2: Certified kosher premium chocolate in an Easter-themed bag for lasting freshness until snack time
Bullet Point 3: Bring crisp, crunchy CADBURY milk chocolate in crisp sugar shells to birthday celebrations and Mother's Day parties throughout the springtime season
Bullet Point 4: Fill hollow plastic eggs with CADBURY MINI EGGS milk chocolate candies and hide them in the most creative spots you can think of for an Easter egg hunt they'll never forget
Bullet Point 5: Includes 36 Ounces TOTAL -- Get this seasonal treat while it lasts!
Product Description: Look no further for the perfect Easter candy than MINI EGGS milk chocolate candy. These premium chocolate eggs are coated with crisp sugar shells in pastel colors, making them the perfect addition to Easter baskets, candy bowls and seasonal décor. These treats make it easy to fill lunch boxes, snack cabinets and movie night snack collections with delicious Easter candy everyone will love. Fill your Easter baskets and plastic eggs with small bags of these milk chocolate candies to treat yourself and those closest to you with a delectable crunchy, smooth candy. Preparing for an Easter egg hunt? Nothing could be better for the occasion than MINI EGGS milk chocolate morsels, which are the perfect size to place inside your plastic eggs.
Value: 36.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium seasonal chocolate product with a strong brand reputation, positioned as a festive treat. The large 36 oz quantity and crisp sugar shell coating suggest a higher price point. Kosher certification and Easter-themed packaging reinforce its premium and limited-availability status.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Marukan Seasoned Gourmet Rice Vinegar, 12 Ounce Glass Bottle (Pack of 1)
Bullet Point 1: Seasoned Rice Vinegar: This carefully blended rice vinegar can be used to prepare sushi rice in your own home. Because it does not contain any fat, it also serves as a healthy ingredient for marinades by mixing it with your choice of oil.
Bullet Point 2: Gourmet Cooking Ingredient: Our rice vinegars are certified Kosher, Vegan, Gluten Free and Non GMO Project Verified. Try all of our varieties: Seasoned, Unseasoned, Organic, Lite and Original
Bullet Point 3: Finest Ingredients: Our vinegars are made from scratch using select California grown rice and acetic acid bacteria from Japan, where it is delicately cultivated to be used in the fermentation process
Bullet Point 4: Natural Brewed Quality: Our vinegars are slowly and naturally brewed using traditional methods developed over three centuries of experience for a delicate aroma, rich flavor and mild taste
Bullet Point 5: Rich Marukan Tradition: Our rice vinegars are milder yet richer in flavor than any others. They're great for use in salads, seafood, pasta, marinades, stir fry, instant pots, pickling and much more
Value: 12.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium gourmet rice vinegar with a rich tradition and certified quality credentials. Glass bottle packaging and gourmet positioning suggest a mid-to-high price point. Certified Kosher, Vegan, Gluten Free, and Non-GMO Project Verified add value. Ideal for specialty cooking and home sushi preparation.
